balance.description: Positive = owes us (debt); Negative = we owe them (credit)

branchId.description: Required for SUPER_ADMIN; ignored for ADMIN
Ignored on create; expense is recorded for authenticated user's branch

amountUsd.description: Original USD amount when currency is USD

branchId.description: Required for SUPER_ADMIN; ignored for ADMIN (uses own branch)
Required for SUPER_ADMIN; ignored for ADMIN

description.example: All types of flat glass products

branchId.description: Branch where an initial zero-balance inventory row is created
Optional. Defaults to the authenticated user's branch; ADMIN cannot override it.

unitCostUzs.description: Defaults to product wholesale price if omitted

fromBranchId.description: Required for SUPER_ADMIN; ignored for ADMIN (uses their branch)

post.summary: Create a new admin and assign to a branch

get.summary: List all admins (filterable by branch and status)
Get a single admin by ID

patch.summary: Update admin details or reassign to another branch

get.summary: Top-level KPIs for a date range
get.description:
Returns aggregated sales, expenses, net profit, inventory value,
low-stock count, customer debt, and pending transfers.
ADMIN sees their branch only; SUPER_ADMIN sees all or a specific branch.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Defaults to the first day of the current month

get.summary: Sales breakdown — by period, type, payment method, and top products

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of top products to return

get.summary: Inventory report — stock value per branch, low-stock items, movement summary

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Used to scope the stock-movement summary

get.summary: Expense breakdown — totals by category and over time
Customer debt summary — total outstanding, overdue breakdown, and top debtors
Get customer detail with recent sales

403.description: Forbidden — customer belongs to another branch

delete.summary: Deactivate a customer (blocked if outstanding debt exists)

200.description: Category list with linked expense count

delete.summary: Delete an expense category (SUPER_ADMIN only, only if no linked expenses)

409.description: Category has linked expenses — deactivate it instead

get.summary: Expense category totals for KPI and breakdown

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum KPI cards. Overflow is grouped into the final item.

delete.summary: Delete an expense (ADMIN within 24h; SUPER_ADMIN anytime)

403.description: Too old to delete or wrong branch

post.summary: Receive goods into branch inventory (creates batch + updates stock)

200.description: Stock adjusted with delta and movement log

parameters.name: branchId
parameters.description: SUPER_ADMIN only — omit to see all branches

parameters.name: lowStock
parameters.description: Filter products at or below their lowStockThreshold

get.summary: Products at or below their low-stock threshold
View delivery batches (FIFO source — cost price per batch)

parameters.name: depleted
parameters.description: true = show fully consumed batches, false = active batches only

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Filter by receivedAt from this timestamp

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Filter by receivedAt until this timestamp

delete.summary: Delete a category (only if no products assigned)

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by name, SKU, or description

get.summary: Lookup a product by SKU (barcode scan)

post.summary: Create a sale (deducts inventory + updates customer debt atomically)

404.description: Product, branch or customer not found

get.summary: List sales with filters (branch-scoped for ADMIN)

parameters.name: overdue
parameters.description: Filter sales where debtDueDate has passed and debt remains

get.summary: Get full sale detail including all items and payments

post.summary: Record an additional payment against an existing sale (debt repayment)

400.description: No outstanding debt on this sale

patch.summary: Set or clear the repayment deadline on a credit sale
patch.description:
Sets `debtDueDate` on a sale that has outstanding debt. Pass `null` to remove
an existing deadline. Once the deadline passes and debt remains, the sale
appears in `GET /sales?overdue=true` and the analytics overdue summary.

post.summary: Create a pending stock transfer between branches

parameters.name: branchId
parameters.description: SUPER_ADMIN only — filter by branch (as source or destination)

403.description: Transfer does not involve your branch

post.summary: Complete a transfer — moves stock atomically
post.description:
Deducts stock from the source branch (FIFO, logged as TRANSFER_OUT) and
adds it to the destination branch (new batch at transfer cost, logged as TRANSFER_IN).
Not counted in sales figures.

409.description: Transfer is not in PENDING status

post.summary: Cancel a pending transfer (no stock movement)
post.description: ADMIN can cancel only their own transfers; SUPER_ADMIN can cancel any.

409.description: Transfer is not in PENDING status
